description: Project parental consequence-annotated variants onto offspring haplotype copies via the Stage 3 inheritance map. Dyad and triad are runtime parameters of the same algorithm; family hubs are NOT a unit of aggregation.

Per-(offspring, gene, segment) classification across the seven-class enum: reference_like / het_masked / hom_exposed_same_variant / compound_het_trans / compound_het_cis / partially_resolved / unresolved.

Per-(dyad or triad) rollup: variant transmission counts, gene-status counts, Mendelian-consistency status, and de-novo candidate flags (triad-only — dyads expose only the parent-hom Mendelian subset).

For damaging variants inside inversion intervals, compare HPP per-offspring hap_copy assignment with the KBC karyotype-derived arrangement-background assignment. Discordances flag Stage-3 boundary noise or KBC-edge effects; not a primary result.

CHAIN: Stage 2 dyad_or_triad_set → Stage 3 inheritance_map → haplotype_projection → offspring_gene_status. Optional terminal blocs: transmission_summary, hpp_kbc_arrangement_crosscheck. Headline product is the per-offspring gene-status table — the manuscript supplementary deliverable.
